title: paspalum laeve var. altissimum
intro: Paspalum laeve var. altissimum, also known as tall smooth paspalum, is a type of grass native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paspalum laeve var. altissimum include its potential to reduce fever, ease respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
